plain_language: Find frequent semantic Reason--Consequence correlations by first building query-context-filtered temporary WCC clusters for Reason and Consequence nodes, then ranking observed cluster pairs by distinct CVE support.

rows.representative_consequence: Elevate privileges on the victim system
reason_examples: improper handling of objects in memory
consequence_examples: Elevate privileges on the victim system
Execute code with elevated permissions
Run arbitrary code in the context of the Local System Account
Gain elevated privileges on the target operating system

rows.representative_consequence: Allows bypass of intended security protections
consequence_examples: Allows bypass of intended security protections
Potential unauthorized actions bypassing security features
Potential unauthorized actions due to the bypass of security features
Security policies intended to protect data access may be circumvented

rows.representative_consequence: Attacker gains higher privileges on the system
reason_examples: The specific reason is not detailed in the description.
consequence_examples: Attacker gains higher privileges on the system
Execution of arbitrary code
An attacker could gain elevated privileges on the system.
Gain higher privileges on the affected system
